subject: Fermi GBM trigger 570716645/190201517 is not a GRB
body:
P Veres (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 570716645 / 190201517 at
12:24:00.077 UT on 1 February 2019, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in
fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to MAXI J1348-630."
